title: Hunker Down
description: When you **take shelter to wait out the elements,** choose 1 party member to roll +nothing.

outcomes.text: It doesn't take long for things to clear up.
Things aren't going to change any time soon. You can Forge Ahead or  Make Camp here for the night and hope things have changed by morning.
Mark XP, and GM makes a move.

title: Forge Ahead (+Constitution)
description: When you **push on despite powerful opposition from the elements**, roll +CON.  If you make progress, ask the GM where you end up on the map, and if the weather shows any sign of relenting.

outcomes.text: You go as far as you are able before needing to pause for a rest.

bullets: You go as far as you are able, but overtax yourself and become *weak*, *shaky* or *sick* (choose one)
You go as far as you are able, but the weather takes its deepest toll on your gear (ask the GM how)
On second thought, maybe your're better off staying put.

outcomes.text: Mark XP, and GM makes a move.
